requested_items.objective: Run a broad rough decoder fp-format sensitivity map over logits, softmax intermediates, reciprocal normalization, and final probabilities.

expected_result.reason: The map should identify whether fp-like dynamic range avoids the fixed q8 probability collapse and where fp8/bf16/fp16 rank cliffs appear on the pinned tiny benchmark.
